notes: Refreshed in spec 39 (pr-comments hardening v2). The W011 severity rose from medium to high between baseline capture and this rerun against the v1.41 SKILL.md; the underlying mitigations (untrusted_comment_body framing, 64 KB body size guard, diff-context validation gate, screening-independence note, argument validators) are documented in the new ## Security model section. Snyk's W011 fires on the presence of `gh api .../comments` ingestion patterns regardless of mitigations — the substantive default-mode defense is the Step 6 diff-context validation gate (path/line check plus diff-hunk content check) backed by auto-mode escalation to a confirmation prompt on any screening-flagged, oversized, or diff-validation-declined comment; `--manual` mode additionally restores the Step 7 confirmation gate before any edit, commit, or push.
